payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while new input says Sara is your niece. These are mutually inconsistent for the same person, so no durable update should be committed without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to the same named person 'Sara', but the relationship to the user is incompatible and cannot both be current without additional context.

details: Compared existing and incoming relationship claims.
Detected direct contradiction on kinship relation for the same named entity.
Chose not to store the new claim as durable memory pending clarification.

repair_options: Ask whether these statements refer to two different people named Sara.
Ask which relationship is correct and whether the older memory should be replaced.
If both are intended, create separate entities with distinguishing context.
